text.title: Agent Shape Decision Frame Examples
text.summary: One worked example: shape decision for a customer-support agent.

example.title: Inputs
example.code: Brief: "Replace tier-1 email support with an agent that reads CRM, drafts replies, escalates to human on uncertainty." Tool inventory: read_crm, search_kb, draft_reply, escalate_to_human (4 tools, all classify as read or scratch) Cost ceiling: $2k/month Eval surface: 200 historical ticket-reply pairs, frozen golden set

example.title: Framing walk
example.code: step 1 turn-count: multi (conversation thread, possibly multiple back-and-forth) step 2 agent-count: single (4 tools, one domain) step 3 tool-surface: 2 read, 2 scratch, 0 prod-mutating (drafts wait for human send) step 4 deployment-surface: custom (SaaS embed inside ticketing tool) step 5 eval-surface: available (200-example golden set)

example.title: Final decision record
